caption:
A Toy Story Pizza Planet pop-up is in London this weekend! 🍕🧩✨

🎁🗺️Link to London promo codes and maps saved in bio 🔗

Enjoy Toy Story pizza, themed drinks, a claw machine, a photo zone, and a shop with Toy Story items😊

📍 Pizza Planet pop-up, White Rabbit Studios, 471–473 Dereham Place, Shoreditch, London 
EC2A 3HJ
📅 13–14 June 
! 18+ only 

🎟️ Free booking recommended online
🚶 Walk-ins may be possible, subject to capacity

📸 @kseniia.journey 

#london #papajohns #toystory #Shoreditch
